programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the v

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a v

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect makes it clear he's not stopping for anyone, it's up to K9 Murphy's speed and determination to bring the chase to an end; K9 Bear's bomb-detection training is suddenly put to the test when explosives detonate in the middle of the night; after eluding police for weeks, a naked fugitive is on the run again; K9 Eddie is called in, and the pursuit ends exactly as his training predicts;

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Cisco responds to a break-in at the last place you'd ever expect - the Fraternal Order of Police Lodge while K9 Karma is deployed on a combative suspect who refuses to go quietly into the night. After his handler is struck by a vehicle, K9 Jakko continues on the pursuit alone, locking onto the trail of an armed suspect and when K9 Mickey makes the takedown, he pays a painful price in the proces

programme.desc: In north London and Hertfordshire, Dawn and Simon bond with hipsters Darren and Sian, but can any of them find common ground with multi-lingual lawyer Ayesha and astrophysicist Stephen.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Rev Kate Bottley in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: 2 Good 2 Be 4 Real: Carla confesses that she's placed a lonely hearts advert in the personal column of a newspaper but has received no replies, so the gang decide to invent one.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane's incensed by the way that Sam refers to her in a radio interview. Norm's confronted with evidence of his wife's infidelity by one of his neighbours.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam challenges rival bar Gary's Tavern to a bowling match, only to find the Cheers regulars are hopelessly bad at the sport. Can Woody step in to help.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra decides to conduct an experiment after seeing Ray's reaction to her friend's breast augmentation.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Ray and Debra have an argument about their new tin opener, Marie, Frank and Robert can't help getting involved.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Is Ray right to be sceptical when Frank uncharacteristically displays a keen interest in his work.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The opening episode of the classic comedy series in which Dr Frasier Crane returns to Seattle, where he has a job as a radio psychiatrist.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle's agent has an offer that would mean the end of his relationship with Beckett. When a woman's body is found down a manhole, the pair realise this may be their last case.

programme.title: Castle

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: The work of Kevin Stephens who discovered a daffodil variety that, grown in windswept conditions at altitude, produces a chemical used in drugs to treat Alzheimer's patients.

programme.title: Michael Portillo in Stockholm

programme.title: Warship: Life in the Royal Navy
